title: Add humanTree root history buffer matching agentTree's 30-root buffer
description: IdentityRegistry.sol maintains a 30-root history buffer for agentTree but none for humanTree. Any new human enrollment immediately invalidates in-flight HumanUniqueness proofs because the on-chain root changes. This is a liveness bug under load: if humans enroll faster than the proving time (~10-15s for Groth16 on mobile), proofs fail deterministically. Add an identical uint256[30] humanRootHistory buffer with the same ring-buffer logic. No circuit changes needed—only the Solidity root check in verifyHandshake needs to query the buffer instead of a single root. Estimated: 30 lines of Solidity.
